name: academorix/marketing
purpose: Marketing outbound substrate — MarketingEvent ledger, MarketingDelivery per-attempt log, MarketingDeadLetter manual-replay queue, per-tenant MarketingProviderConfig.
when_to_use: Composing and dispatching an email or SMS campaign against a segmented tenant audience.
when_not_to_use: For transactional user notifications, reach for the sibling academorix/notifications-sdk consumers instead.
